    <T> Flux<ChangeStreamEvent<T>>
    ReactiveMongoOperations.changeStream(@Nullable String database, @Nullable String collectionName, ChangeStreamOptions options, Class<T> targetType)
    Subscribe to a MongoDB Change Stream via the reactive infrastructure.
    default <T> Flux<ChangeStreamEvent<T>>
    ReactiveMongoOperations.changeStream(@Nullable String collectionName, ChangeStreamOptions options, Class<T> targetType)
    Subscribe to a MongoDB Change Stream for all events in the given collection via the reactive infrastructure.
    default <T> Flux<ChangeStreamEvent<T>>
    ReactiveMongoOperations.changeStream(ChangeStreamOptions options, Class<T> targetType)
    Subscribe to a MongoDB Change Stream for all events in the configured default database via the reactive infrastructure.

    ReactiveMongoTemplate.changeStream(@Nullable String database, @Nullable String collectionName, ChangeStreamOptions options, Class<T> targetType)
